nodes.label: Word domain: run real WordMaster and WordWriter pipeline with falsifiable oracle
Excel domain: run real ExcelMaster/Writer or forge formula validator with falsif
PPT domain: run PowerPointMaster/pptx context extraction with falsifiable oracle
Legal domain: run CUAD clause detection on prompt with falsifiable oracle.
CUA domain: verify safety and IPC limits and fallback behaviors.
Security domain: verify integrity guard rejects known violations.
Memory domain: verify DP noise meets CSPRNG expectations.
Offline domain: verify sidecar self check responds offline_mode=True under KAIRO
Degradation domain: verify graceful rejection of nonexistent domains/actions.
Performance domain: verify execution speed boundaries are honored.
PDF domain: run real PDFMaster and extract context using fitz.
Design domain: run DesignMaster extract_context and verify tokens/dimensions.
Code domain: run CodeMaster on temp source file and verify style/language/contex
Terminal domain: run TerminalMaster extract_context and verify os_type, shell_ty
Email domain: run EmailMaster extract_context and verify email_client, preferred
Execute one scenario and return a result dict. Never raises.
Run all scenarios, build report, write JSON, return report dict.
